framing_header_truncated_42.description: Only 42 bytes supplied; outer header needs 58.

framing_header_truncated_57.description: 57 bytes — one short of a complete header.

framing_header_body_size_overflow.description: Header declares body_size=2^62; receiver has no such body.

framing_header_body_size_greater_than_bu.description: Header declares 48-byte TRANSFORM body, only 10 bytes follow.

framing_header_body_size_uint64_max.description: body_size=UINT64_MAX. Regression for C++ parse_wire integer-overflow (fuzzer 2026-04-17): kHeaderSize + body_size wraps and bypasses bounds check.

framing_header_version_future.description: Protocol version=99 is claimed-future; receiver does not recognize.

framing_header_crc_mismatch.description: Valid TRANSFORM body with deliberately wrong CRC-64.

framing_ext_header_exceeds_body.description: v2 ext_header_size=100 but body is only 12 bytes.

framing_metadata_region_overflow.description: metadata_size=1000 but body has no room for a metadata region.

framing_metadata_count_truncated.description: metadata index claims 5 entries but only contains 1 entry's worth of bytes.

framing_metadata_value_size_overflow.description: metadata entry's value_size=0xFFFFFFFF, far past buffer end.

content_transform_body_47.description: TRANSFORM body must be exactly 48 bytes; 47 supplied.

content_transform_body_49.description: TRANSFORM body must be exactly 48 bytes; 49 supplied.

content_ndarray_dim_size_mismatch.description: NDARRAY dim=3 but size array only has 2 entries.

content_ndarray_dim_huge.description: NDARRAY dim=200; size array would need 400 bytes but body has 0.

content_ndarray_invalid_scalar_type.description: NDARRAY scalar_type=0; valid set is {2,3,4,5,6,7,10,11,13}. Regression for post_unpack_invariant=ndarray.

content_ndarray_data_size_mismatch.description: NDARRAY data length 16 bytes, expected product(size=[3]) × bytes_per_scalar(11)=8 = 24. Regression for post_unpack_invariant=ndarray.

content_image_invalid_scalar_type.description: IMAGE scalar_type=13 (complex); valid IMAGE set is {2,3,4,5,6,7,10,11} — complex is NDARRAY-only. Regression for post_unpack_invariant=image.

content_image_pixel_size_mismatch.description: IMAGE pixels length 32 bytes, expected product(subvol_size=[4,4,4])×num_components=1×bytes_per_scalar(3)=1 = 64. Regression for post_unpack_invariant=image.

content_colort_invalid_index_type.description: COLORT index_type=0; valid set is {3,5}. Upstream fallthrough accepts — we reject per spec.

content_colort_invalid_map_type.description: COLORT map_type=17; valid set is {3,5,19}. Upstream fallthrough treats as RGB — we reject per spec.

content_colort_table_size_mismatch.description: COLORT (3,5) expects 256×2=512-byte table; body only has 256.

content_polydata_size_vertices_unaligned.description: POLYDATA size_vertices=7; spec requires multiple of 4 (each entry is a uint32).

content_bind_nametable_size_odd.description: BIND nametable_size=3; spec requires even (2-byte aligned).

content_bind_bodies_size_mismatch.description: BIND: one header_entry body_size=10 but bodies section is 4B.

content_sensor_larray_mismatch.description: SENSOR larray=10 floats but data region has 1 float.

content_string_length_overflow.description: STRING length=100 but value buffer has 5 bytes.

content_bind_ncmessages_huge.description: BIND ncmessages=10000 but body has no room for entries.
